evals.prompt: This session we renamed the build entrypoint: the old `bash build.sh` is now `make build`, and the way humans run the app changed from `./run.sh` to `make run`. Update the docs to capture these learnings.
assertions: Reports which audience-rule layers are in effect (a 'Rules loaded:' line)
Updates CLAUDE.md to capture the Claude-facing build-command change (make build)
Updates README.md (human-facing) with the corrected run command (make run), not CLAUDE.md

evals.prompt: Heads up for our users: installation changed from `pip install foo` to `pipx install foo`, and you now start the app with `foo serve` instead of `python app.py`. Update the docs.
assertions: README.md is updated with the new human-facing install command (pipx install foo)
README.md is updated with the new human-facing run command (foo serve)
The human-facing changes are NOT written into CLAUDE.md (no pipx/foo serve in CLAUDE.md); CLAUDE.md's unrelated content is left intact
